docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKRUZNY, VINCENT V. AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $801.29 FILED BY SKRUZNY, VINCENT V. AS TO DEFENDANT ST FRANCIS SQUARE COOPERATIVE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
